name: lumenchain
description: LumenChain — an original, open multi-agent cognitive stack: perception, a neural bus, a reasoning brain, multi-brain orchestration, evolutionary learning, and a skill workshop. Built to run on top of (but independent from) OpenClaw and other MCP coding agents.
author: Ming-Hsiu Yeh (yuye7973)

scripts.test: echo run tests per package: npm test -w <package>
